categories.label: Materiality
categories.description: Earnings Beat/Miss, Product Recall, Major Contract Win/Loss, Bankruptcy Filing, Regulatory Penalty, M&A Completion. 0 = noise with no impact, 10 = direct large impact on revenue/margins/TAM.

categories.label: Surprise & Unexpectedness
categories.description: Sudden CEO Departure, Unannounced Acquisition, Regulatory Shock, Unexpected Dividend Cut, Flash Pre-announcement. 0 = fully expected outcome, 10 = completely unexpected outcome.

categories.label: Sentiment Strength
categories.description: Earnings Blowout, Catastrophic Loss, Transformative Partnership, Fraud Revelation, Analyst Consensus Reversal. 0 = neutral tone, 10 = extremely strong positive or negative signal.

categories.label: Directional Clarity
categories.description: Clear Guidance Raise/Cut, FDA Approval/Rejection, Definitive Merger Agreement, Regulatory Ruling, Contract Win/Loss. 0 = ambiguous/could go either way, 10 = unambiguously good or bad.

categories.label: Information Density
categories.description: Full Earnings Release, Detailed Guidance, SEC Filing with Data, Analyst Research Report, Verified Technical Data. 0 = pure opinion/speculation, 10 = hard data with specific numbers.

categories.label: Impact Timeline & Duration
categories.description: Score how long the price impact is likely to persist: 0-3 = fades within days (sentiment-only, speculative, one-time); 4-6 = resolves within weeks to months; 7-10 = permanently alters business trajectory (structural, confirmed, recurring).

categories.label: Narrative Shift
categories.description: CEO Scandal reversing trust, Earnings Miss breaking growth story, Turnaround Success, Business Model Pivot. 0 = reinforces existing narrative, 10 = fundamentally changes investment thesis.

categories.label: Scope & Breadth
categories.description: Full Company Guidance, CEO Departure, Capital Structure Change, Single Product Issue, Regional Sales Miss. 0 = only this company/product, 5 = sector-wide, 10 = macro/market-wide.

categories.label: Competitive Impact
categories.description: Competitor Bankruptcy, Patent Win/Loss, Market Share Data Release, Competitor Product Launch, Pricing War. 0 = no competitive effect, 10 = major competitive shift.

categories.label: Regulatory Risk
categories.description: Antitrust Investigation, FDA Rejection, SEC Investigation, Tax Ruling, License Revocation, Compliance Violation. 0 = no regulatory angle, 10 = major legal/regulatory event.

categories.label: Financial Result Surprise
categories.description: EPS Beat/Miss vs Consensus, Revenue vs Guidance, Margin Surprise, Cash Flow Miss, Financial Restatement. 0 = no financial results or results exactly match expectations, 10 = figures dramatically exceed or miss prior guidance and analyst expectations.

categories.label: Earnings & Financial Results
categories.description: Earnings Release, Revenue Guidance, Profit Warning, Annual Report, Quarterly Filing, Financial Restatement. Score how central this news is to the company's reported financial performance.

categories.label: Market & Sector Sentiment
categories.description: Sector Rotation, Industry-wide Regulation, Commodity Price Move, Macro Data Release, Fed Decision, Peer Earnings. Score how much this news reflects broad market or sector-level dynamics.

categories.label: Analyst Consensus Signals
categories.description: Rating Upgrade/Downgrade, Price Target Revision, Analyst Initiation, Consensus Estimate Change, Analyst Day. Score how much this news reflects analyst community views on the stock.

categories.label: Catalyst Immediacy
categories.description: Trading Halt, Breaking Announcement, Flash Pre-announcement, Scheduled Earnings, Long-term Roadmap Reveal. 0 = background/long-term context only, 10 = immediate market-moving catalyst.

categories.label: Systemic & Contagion Risk
categories.description: Banking Sector Stress, Supply Chain Collapse, Industry-wide Regulatory Sweep, Peer Earnings Warning, Macro Shock. Score how much this news signals risk spreading beyond the single company.

categories.label: Management & Credibility
categories.description: CEO/CFO Appointment or Resignation, Insider Trading, Executive Misconduct, Board Restructuring, Governance Change. Score how much this news affects trust in and stability of leadership.

categories.label: Capital Allocation Signal
categories.description: Share Buyback Program, Dividend Initiation/Cut, Major CapEx Announcement, Debt Issuance, Equity Offering. Score how much this news reveals management's capital deployment priorities.

categories.label: Valuation & Growth Outlook
categories.description: Long-term Growth Rate Revision, Margin Expansion/Compression, TAM Update, Business Model Change, Multiple Re-rating. Score how much this news changes the long-term growth or valuation narrative.

categories.label: Sentiment Direction
categories.description: Score the net directional tone of the news: 0 = entirely negative/bearish, 5 = neutral or balanced with no clear lean, 10 = entirely positive/bullish. Score the article's net tone — a mixed article with more negative weight scores 3, not 5.

categories.label: Search & Ad Tech Antitrust
categories.description: DOJ and EU antitrust cases targeting Google's search monopoly, ad tech dominance, and Play Store practices, including potential structural breakup remedies that threaten GOOGL's core business model.

categories.label: Generative AI Product Development
categories.description: Development and launch of Google's AI models and products including Gemini, DeepMind research breakthroughs (AlphaFold), custom AI chips (Trillium, Axion), and AI integration across Search and other services.

categories.label: Cloud Platform & Enterprise Partnerships
categories.description: Google Cloud revenue performance, enterprise AI partnerships with major corporations (Vodafone, Hitachi, CMA CGM, Accenture), and Vertex AI platform deals driving diversification beyond advertising.

categories.label: Data Center & Energy Infrastructure
categories.description: Multi-billion dollar global data center investments across the US, Europe, and Asia-Pacific, and strategic energy procurement deals including nuclear (Kairos), solar, wind, and geothermal to power AI infrastructure.

categories.label: Waymo Autonomous Vehicles
categories.description: Waymo self-driving vehicle safety incidents, NHTSA regulatory probes, robotaxi service area expansions to Los Angeles and other cities, and autonomous mobility commercial strategy.

categories.label: YouTube Platform & Content Ecosystem
categories.description: YouTube content moderation decisions, e-commerce integrations (Shopee), creator features (context notes), video advertising regulatory issues, and platform-specific compliance across global jurisdictions.

categories.label: AI Investment & Talent Strategy
categories.description: Strategic AI ecosystem investments (Anthropic partnership and antitrust scrutiny), acqui-hires (Character.AI cofounders), major acquisition pursuits (Wiz, HubSpot), and competition for AI research talent.

categories.label: User Data & Privacy Practices
categories.description: Privacy litigation and settlements (Google Plus breach, browsing data), Chrome third-party cookie changes, data protection investigations (Ireland, Austria, Italy), and AI-generated content safety controversies including Gemini image bias pause.
